commit.message:
Fix crawler pipeline: remove broken partition filter and fix Flyway version

- Remove partition-based URL filtering from CrawlScheduler that silently
  dropped URLs dequeued by the wrong downloader instance
- Remove incompatible flyway-database-postgresql:10.8.1 dependency that
  crashed url-seen (AbstractMethodError with flyway-core 9.x)

Fix Gradle SIGSEGV crash in Docker builds on ARM (Apple Silicon)

Switch build stage from eclipse-temurin:21-jdk-alpine to eclipse-temurin:21-jdk
to avoid musl libc native library crash, and add --no-watch-fs flag.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Simplify connection path in architecture diagram

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Update architecture diagram via draw.io desktop editor

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement distributed web crawler with 6 microservices

Java 21 / Spring Boot 3.2 / Kafka-based pipeline:
- Seed URL Controller: REST API for submitting crawl seeds
- URL Frontier: politeness-enforced, disk-backed URL queue
- HTML Downloader (x3): virtual thread downloads with robots.txt
- Link Extractor (x2): Jsoup-based link parsing
- URL Filter: extension/domain/depth filtering
- URL Seen: Bloom filter + PostgreSQL deduplication

Includes Docker Compose (14 containers), Prometheus/Grafana
monitoring, unit tests, README, and draw.io architecture diagram.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(config): include Prisma engine in Server Action bundles on Vercel

Server Actions bundle with the page's serverless function, not the API
route's. Add outputFileTracingIncludes to ensure the Prisma query engine
binary is copied into all serverless function bundles.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add rename feature to person management view

Backend:
- PATCH /api/people/{name} relabels all faces with the given name;
  empty/null new_name clears the label; rebuilds people cache after

Frontend (renderPersonFaces):
- Fetches /api/people alongside face data for known-name checks
- Adds "Rename person" section with autocomplete datalist
- Warns with confirm() before clearing (unlabels all faces) or
  merging into an existing name; proceeds silently for a plain rename
- Navigates to the renamed person's manage page on success,
  or back to People list when the label is cleared

commit.message:
opus-2026-03-06-S26: IO walk GF analysis — W(z)*W(-z)=1 proved

IO walk GF W(z) = det(I+zA^T)/det(I-zA):
- W(z)*W(-z) = 1 for ALL tournaments (IO reciprocity)
- Proof: det(M^T) = det(M) for any matrix
- Paley T_5 has pole at z=1/2 (eigenvalue 2 of A)
- W(z) encodes cycle covers, M encodes signed paths — different objects
- Connection to M must go through multilinear (vertex-tracking) version

commit.message:
feat: GRANDOS v0.1 — Goal-driven Execution and Observation Open Spec

Initial public release of the GRANDOS protocol specification.

Core entities (G-R-A-N-D-O-S): Goal, Run, Action, Narrative, Decision,
Outcome, Signal. Plus Scene (trust boundary), Resource (finite pools),
and Clause (governance constraints).

Three-plane model: Control (human intent), Execution (agent work),
Observation (feedback loop).

Includes:
- Normative protocol spec (GRANDOS-PROTOCOL.md) with full CRUD commands
- CUE schemas (source of truth) with UUIDv7 ID enforcement
- JSON Schema distribution format (generated from CUE)
- 21 positive + 5 negative conformance test vectors
- Conformance harness (CUE vet + AJV validation)
- Domain commands with optimistic concurrency (expected_version)
- Append-only event envelope with causation/correlation chains
- Strategy-layer additions: Resource allocation, Goal tiers, Signal reliability

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix: Filesystem root path evaluated eagerly, ignoring late storage.path overrides (#3355) (#3355)

NodeJsFilesystem captured storage.path at boot time during Boot.init, before
user code had a chance to set it. Applications that set storage.path after
accessing Environment.default (the normal usage pattern) would have storage
opened from the default ~/.matter directory instead of their configured path.

Make NodeJsFilesystem accept a getter function for its root path so it resolves
lazily at access time.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
chore: remove verified unused methods from PMmodule and casemgmt (#538)

Remove 4 dead methods confirmed unused via thorough codebase search
across all file types (Java, JSP, JSPF, XML, JSON, JS, properties):

- ProgramAccess.addToRoles(Secrole): convenience method never called;
  Hibernate uses setRoles()/getRoles() for the collection mapping
- ProgramProvider.addToTeams(Object): convenience method never called;
  Hibernate uses setTeams()/getTeams() for the collection mapping
- CreateAnonymousClientAction.generatePEClient(): only caller
  (GroupNoteAction) uses generateAnonymousClient(), not this method
- CaseManagementEntry2Action.inCaseIssue(): protected method with no
  subclasses and no internal callers

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add early stopping, fix DeltaNet cache, fix ToMe rope_index bug (#2)

Phase 1 Step 3: EOS-probability early stopping in custom generate loop
- EarlyStopConfig checks P(EOS) after each decode step
- Exposed via EngineConfig (early_stop + early_stop_threshold)
- Verified lossless: 0% accuracy delta across all benchmarks

DeltaNet (Qwen3.5) compatibility fixes in PromptCache:
- ArraysCache has no offset/trim — added is_trimmable guard
- Always recreate ArraysCache to prevent state pollution
- Disabled exact-match cache hit for non-trimmable caches

ToMe rope_index broadcast fix:
- Grid alignment: pad/truncate hidden_states when compressed_grid
  token count doesn't match compressed_count (integer rounding)
- Qwen2.5-VL-3B and Qwen3-VL-4B ToMe now work end-to-end

New baselines: Qwen2.5-VL-3B ToMe r=4, Qwen3-VL-4B ToMe r=4

commit.message:
Add chapters 07-11 with full interactive simulations

- ch07 조합논리회로: halfFullAdder, decoderSim, multiplexerSim (4:1/8:1 MUX, 1:4/1:8 DEMUX)
- ch08 플립플롭: flipFlopSim (SR래치, D/JK/T FF with timing diagrams)
- ch09 동기 순서논리회로: stateMachine (Mod-3 카운터, 1011 검출기, 자동판매기 FSM)
- ch10 카운터와 레지스터: counterSim (비동기/동기/BCD/업다운), shiftRegister (SISO/SIPO/PISO/PIPO/링/존슨)
- ch11 메모리: memorySim (ROM, SRAM, DRAM 개념, 메모리 계층)

commit.message:
Bump to 2 gunicorn workers for ~8 concurrent LLM queries

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: rename-aside stale node_modules dirs when rmSync/chmod fail (EACCES)

In devcontainers, stale npm dirs may be owned by root, so both rmSync
and chmod fail with EACCES. rename() only requires write permission on
the parent directory (node_modules/), not on contents. As a last resort,
rename the stale dir aside so npm can reuse the original name.

commit.message:
fix: realistic BAC calculation with first-order absorption model + uncap drink limit

- Replace instant-absorption Widmark with Norberg 2003 first-order absorption model
  (ka=6.5/hr). BAC now rises realistically over ~30-45 min instead of spiking
  immediately at t=0. Example: 145lb male, 3 shots → peak BAC ~0.055 at 45min
  instead of incorrectly showing 0.094 at t=0.
- Remove max="30" cap on personal drink limit input field
- Add 12 and 15 to quick-pick preset buttons
- Rename "limit" label to "goal" for personal limit
